versions.theme: Near-black `#0A0A0B` + violet `#A78BFA` → cyan `#22D3EE` gradient · light/dark toggle

versions.theme: Mesh gradient (4-blob aurora) + grainy noise · violet `#A855F7` + magenta `#EC4899` + cyan `#06B6D4` + warm pink `#F472B6`
versions.headline: Aurora · 2026 gradient renaissance applied to HRMS · 4 stacked radial-gradient blobs at quadrant anchors · SVG feTurbulence noise overlay (grainy aurora texture) · frosted-glass punch disc with backdrop-blur · 3-keyframe cycling halo (violet → magenta → cyan) · carries v16's light/dark toggle

versions.theme: Light · warm coral `#FF6B35` (first non-violet/cobalt/red accent)
versions.headline: Stacks · widget-gallery applied to HRMS · stack of modular tiles instead of one hero circle · hero tile morphs across four shift states (pre-punch · punch moment · mid-shift · post-punch) · lineage: iOS widget gallery · Apple Sports · Apple Watch face stack · Arc Search

versions.theme: Monochrome · single coral dot `#FF6B35` only when punched in
versions.headline: Quiet · Swiss minimalist counter to v18 · no tiles, cards, borders, shadows · hairline dividers only · type does the work · lineage: Apple Health single-stat · iA Writer · Patagonia editorial · Stripe Press · Helvetica Now

versions.theme: Quiet (v19) monochrome · tier-aware topbar chip (`wifi`/`geo`/`gps`)
versions.headline: Quiet + tier-aware · v19 plus verification-source line, tier-aware topbar chip, shift-end-in countdown, and an alert line that appears only when something is wrong · same coral pixel budget

versions.theme: **Live palette customizer** · pick any preset (Swiggy/Zepto/Cult/PhonePe) or HSB-wheel custom; all CSS vars update live

versions.theme: v21 palette base · identity vs work split
versions.ia: Profile pill (top nav · slim sheet) + Office tab (Self/Manage segmented) — replaces bottom-bar Me
versions.headline: Profile + Office · avatar pill next to bell opens slim Profile sheet (identity, preferences, sign-out) · bottom Me tab replaced by Office tab carrying a Self/Manage segmented control · Lucide fingerprint-pattern punch icon

versions.theme: SF-Symbol icons · light · per-role accent palette (navy / plum / teal / olive / coral / amber)
versions.ia: Role-aware tab bar — six distinct Home heroes (owner · admin · manager · team_lead · employee · member); same chassis, different content shape
versions.headline: Role-distinct heroes · first version to drop the "one hero for everyone" mistake · mirrors backend authz.ts ROLE_CATALOG one-to-one · Owner gets attention queue · Admin gets onboarding pipeline · Manager gets branch pulse · Team Lead gets team roster with salary peek · Employee keeps Punch · Member gets onboarding checklist · landing demo defaults to Owner so the first frame for execs/investors is "decision queue for a multi-branch business," not "tap to clock in"
